title: Gandasulium sieboldii
intro: Gandasulium sieboldii, also known as Siebold's gandasul, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant is used in traditional medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation, fight infections, and protect against cell damage. The bioactive constituents of G. sieboldii include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, G. sieboldii is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and digestive issues.
